description_long: This is an adult female pedestrian with a medium build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally. She is dressed in a fitted, long-sleeve dress with a deep V-neckline and wears semi-opaque tights. Her footwear consists of casual lace-up sneakers, and her hair is styled in a straight, shoulder-length cut with a side part. The figure's facial features are visible from the front, and her overall appearance suggests she is prepared for an urban or casual social environment. The clothing fits closely to the body, and the shoes appear comfortable for walking. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman in a fitted long-sleeve dress, tights, and sneakers, standing with arms outstretched and shoulder-length straight hair.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, deep V-neckline, and full frontal details of the dress and sneakers.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and the contour of the dress and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, straight hair, and the back of the dress and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the body, arm, and the side of the dress and sneakers.
attribute_clothing_type: fitted long-sleeve dress with a deep V-neckline and semi-opaque tights
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
attribute_hairstyle: shoulder-length straight hair with a side part
